/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/benchmark_cpp.dir/benchmark_cpp.cpp.o -o benchmark_cpp  -Wl,-rpath,/Users/jadenbarnwell/Desktop/tool_tracker/Tool-Tracking-System/third_party/onnxruntime/lib -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib /Users/jadenbarnwell/Desktop/tool_tracker/Tool-Tracking-System/third_party/onnxruntime/lib/libonnxruntime.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libopencv_highgui.4.13.0.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libopencv_videoio.4.13.0.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libopencv_imgcodecs.4.13.0.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libopencv_imgproc.4.13.0.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libopencv_core.4.13.0.dylib
